sync_log.summary: 45-commit incremental sync — auth token sync refactor (Claude token type detection, Codex write-back), SSH key invite, RBAC multi-org fixes, harness git policy fixes, shared package extraction, private-skills glob exclusion

32-commit incremental sync — object store + org filesystem (presigned URLs, share tokens, public paths, app object stores), Codex harness fixes (auth, sandbox, streaming), CLI improvements (admin users, --version, first-experience auth, log normalization), worker image tooling (gh, jq)

33-commit incremental sync — Slack integration (gateway simulate, provider bootstrap, OAuth install, Block Kit, identity resolution, rate limiting), app SSO (@eve-horizon/auth + @eve-horizon/auth-react, eveUserAuth middleware), GitHub webhook setup, terraform-only infra policy, CLI (chat simulate gateway routing, identity link, integrations expansion, ollama pull/models)

11-commit incremental sync — Eve Auth SDK published to npm (@eve-horizon/auth), full SDK system doc (373 lines), eve-sdk overview doc, enriched user visibility (eve user show), admin membership table improvements, system health degraded-state handling. Sentinel-mgr SSO migration patterns distilled into auth skills.

20-commit incremental sync — Pi coding agent harness (Phase 1), worker org-fs parity (.org/ mount in all execution paths), Pi skill discovery, eve-worker CLI removal, ECR public auto-auth for eve local up, auth-react SSO redirect fix
